mapper.select:
SELECT id, config_id, tenant_id, app_id, mch_id, mch_key, api_v3_key, mch_serial_no, private_key, private_key_path, wechatpay_public_key_id, wechatpay_public_key, wechatpay_public_key_path, platform_cert_serial_no, platform_cert_path, api_domain, connect_timeout, read_timeout, notify_url, refund_notify_url, sandbox, sign_type, cert_store_type, auto_download_cert, sub_app_id, sub_mch_id, profit_sharing, is_deleted, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by FROM pay_config_wechat
AND config_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.configId}, '%')
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND app_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.appId}, '%')
AND mch_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.mchId}, '%')
AND mch_serial_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.mchSerialNo}, '%')
AND wechatpay_public_key_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.wechatpayPublicKeyId}, '%')
AND create_by LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.createBy}, '%')
